topWPAPlays.description: Nico Hoerner grounds into a force out, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Nick Allen. Dansby Swanson out at 2nd.
Pete Crow-Armstrong homers (6) on a fly ball to right field. Miguel Amaya scores.
Christian Vázquez homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field.
Seiya Suzuki pops out to shortstop Jeremy Peña on the infield fly rule.
Michael Conforto grounds out, shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker.
Kyle Manzardo homers (5) on a fly ball to left field.
Justin Crawford grounds into a double play, second baseman Travis Bazzana to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. J.T. Realmuto out at 2nd. Justin Crawford out at 1st.
Adolis García strikes out swinging and Brandon Marsh caught stealing 2nd, catcher Austin Hedges to second baseman Travis Bazzana to catcher Austin Hedges.
Trea Turner flies out to shortstop Brayan Rocchio.
Kyle Schwarber strikes out swinging.
Jonathan Aranda doubles (8) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Trent Grisham. Chandler Simpson scores. Junior Caminero to 3rd.
Junior Caminero singles on a ground ball to center fielder Trent Grisham. Chandler Simpson to 3rd.
Cedric Mullins doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Aaron Judge. Jonny DeLuca to 3rd.
Nick Fortes strikes out swinging.
Richie Palacios singles on a ground ball to center fielder Trent Grisham, deflected by pitcher Tim Hill. Junior Caminero scores. Jonathan Aranda scores. Yandy Díaz to 3rd.
Konnor Griffin strikes out swinging.
Yohendrick Piñango doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Esmerlyn Valdez. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores. Daulton Varsho scores.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a ground ball to center fielder Daulton Varsho. Jhostynxon Garcia to 3rd.

Daulton Varsho reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Spencer Horwitz. George Springer scores. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 3rd. Daulton Varsho to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Spencer Horwitz.
Jake Mangum grounds out to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Austin Martin homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Brooks Lee scores.
Byron Buxton homers (16) on a fly ball to center field. Luke Keaschall scores.
Mickey Gasper flies out to right fielder Austin Martin.
Ryan Kreidler doubles (2) on a ground ball to left fielder Jarren Duran. Josh Bell scores. Gabriel Gonzalez to 3rd.
Wilyer Abreu grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Kody Clemens. Jarren Duran out at 2nd. Wilyer Abreu out at 1st.
Owen Caissie singles on a ground ball to center fielder A.J. Ewing. Esteury Ruiz scores.
Juan Soto homers (10) on a fly ball to right center field.
Bo Bichette flies out to center fielder Jakob Marsee.
Nick Morabito strikes out swinging.
Mark Vientos grounds into a double play, shortstop Javier Sanoja to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Liam Hicks. Juan Soto out at 2nd. Mark Vientos out at 1st.
Pete Alonso homers (10) on a fly ball to right field. Jackson Holliday scores. Gunnar Henderson scores.
Jackson Holliday homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. Colton Cowser scores.
Spencer Torkelson hits a ground-rule double (10) on a line drive down the left-field line. Riley Greene to 3rd.
Hao-Yu Lee singles on a ground ball to third baseman Coby Mayo. Spencer Torkelson scores. Zach McKinstry to 2nd.
Colton Cowser singles on a ground ball to right fielder Zach McKinstry. Leody Taveras to 3rd.
CJ Abrams triples (2) on a line drive to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr. James Wood scores. Andrés Chaparro scores.
Chadwick Tromp singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Dylan Crews. Eli White scores.
Mauricio Dubón singles on a ground ball to shortstop CJ Abrams. Chadwick Tromp scores. Ronald Acuña Jr. to 2nd.
Dominic Smith singles on a line drive to right fielder Dylan Crews. Michael Harris II scores. Austin Riley to 3rd.
CJ Abrams homers (11) on a fly ball to right center field.
Mitch Garver homers (2) on a fly ball to left field. Cole Young scores.
Victor Robles grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Mitch Garver out at 2nd. Victor Robles out at 1st.
Bobby Witt Jr. lines out to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.
Vinnie Pasquantino lines out sharply to right fielder Luke Raley.
Maikel Garcia singles on a line drive to right fielder Luke Raley. Michael Massey to 2nd.
William Contreras homers (4) on a fly ball to left field. Jackson Chourio scores. Brice Turang scores.
Brice Turang singles on a line drive to center fielder Andy Pages. Jackson Chourio to 2nd.
Andrew Vaughn doubles (4) on a fly ball to center fielder Andy Pages. William Contreras scores.
Max Muncy pops out to second baseman Brice Turang.
Shohei Ohtani walks.
Wade Meckler homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field. Mike Trout scores. Jorge Soler scores.
Oswald Peraza homers (6) on a fly ball to left center field.
Zach Neto homers (9) on a fly ball to left field.
Evan Carter triples (1) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Mike Trout. Jake Burger scores. Justin Foscue scores.
Josh Jung grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.
Chad Stevens singles on a line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Sterlin Thompson scores.
TJ Rumfield doubles (9) on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Hunter Goodman scores.
Ildemaro Vargas grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman Willi Castro. Nolan Arenado out at 2nd. Ildemaro Vargas out at 1st.
Sterlin Thompson doubles (1) on a line drive to center fielder Jorge Barrosa.
Lourdes Gurriel Jr. singles on a ground ball to left fielder Troy Johnston. Geraldo Perdomo scores. Lourdes Gurriel Jr. to 2nd.
Ramón Laureano homers (6) on a fly ball to left field.
Manny Machado homers (8) on a line drive to left center field. Fernando Tatis Jr. scores.
Nick Castellanos homers (4) on a fly ball to left field.
Nick Kurtz doubles (11) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Bryce Johnson. Carlos Cortes scores.
Colby Thomas strikes out swinging.
Andrew Benintendi doubles (8) on a line drive to center fielder Harrison Bader. Munetaka Murakami scores. Colson Montgomery scores. Chase Meidroth to 3rd.
Chase Meidroth walks. Sam Antonacci scores. Munetaka Murakami to 3rd. Colson Montgomery to 2nd.
Colson Montgomery singles on a ground ball to third baseman Matt Chapman. Sam Antonacci to 3rd. Munetaka Murakami to 2nd.
Giants challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Munetaka Murakami hit by pitch. Sam Antonacci to 2nd.
Miguel Vargas flies out to left fielder Casey Schmitt.
